prompt_text:
Consider the following ethical dilemma:

You are in a committed relationship but enjoy having friendly conversations with a co-worker of the opposite sex. Your partner has expressed discomfort with this, finding it inappropriate, even though your interactions with your co-worker are purely platonic. Should you continue your friendly interactions with your co-worker and risk upsetting your partner, or should you maintain peace in your relationship and limit your social interactions at work?

Analyze this dilemma thoroughly, considering all perspectives and ethical principles at stake.
